devdoc.details: Contract module that helps prevent reentrant calls to a function. Inheriting from `ReentrancyGuard` will make the {nonReentrant} modifier available, which can be applied to functions to ensure there are no nested (reentrant) calls. Note: Since `nonReentrant` prevents reentrancy across a single function, you cannot mark a function as `nonReentrant` and then call another `nonReentrant` function inside it. This can be worked around by making those functions `private`, and then adding `external` `nonReentrant` entry points to them.
